scenario: drum45 hold-out: acrylic drum inclined 45 deg, 5 rpm, 50% fill (Sugirbay et al. 2022, never used in calibration)
sigma_source: pooled within-group sqrt(MS_within) = sqrt(8.52), Table 2 ANOVA at alpha=45 (16 df) — same convention as the vertical drum target
criterion: |predicted - 43.65| <= 2.0*sigma_45 = 5.84 deg on the representative set, with n_ok >= 4 of 5 seeds and no steadiness-drift warnings

fixed_protocol_inputs.wall_friction: all walls (shell + covers) wheat-acrylic 0.36/0.29 — Sugirbay Table 11, calibrated on their 7-sphere clumps, carried as fixed input

prestated_deviations: axial length 25 mm vs published 50 mm — biases the 45-deg comparison MORE than vertical (bed rests on the cover, trace measured at the cover); bounded by a one-off 50 mm sensitivity run in M3
single spheres vs 7-sphere clumps — mu_r absorbs shape effects (locked Phase-3 decision)
2-5 seeds vs 5 physical reps x 4 frames
prestated_expectation_endpoints: with all walls pinned to acrylic the 45-deg response is plausibly family-degenerate (like the vertical drum); endpoint separation is informational, not gating
